_comment: v4.0.35 — narrow Cognitive Eval Harness (Codex roadmap Phase 7a). Scenarios exercise the cognitive contour built up across Phases 1-5: BeliefState, TaskState, ActionPlanner, Verifier, UncertaintyPolicy. Each scenario runs a fixed turn sequence through Conversation::turn_with_trace and asserts against trace signals (action, task status, epistemic status, output substrings). Initial baseline: every scenario must pass.

scenarios.description: Asking same topic twice keeps the goal — set_at_turn must not advance.
Social turn (рахмет) between same-topic turns must not erase the goal.
Many social turns + topic — goal_set_at_turn reflects real turn index, not capped at MAX_HISTORY.
Different topic in second turn switches the goal.
Topic switch through a social turn still installs new topic at the right turn id.
Subgoals reset on topic switch (none in v4.0.35 but invariant must hold).
Two conflicting city statements → belief logs conflict, status becomes Blocked, epistemic Conflicted.
After conflict + topic question, reply must cite both values + clarification cue.
Conflict reply must use Kazakh predicate label, not raw English slot key.
Greeting → Action::Social, EpistemicStatus::Certain.
Thanks → Action::Social, EpistemicStatus::Certain.
Real Kazakh noun without attached reasoning chain or retrieval index → AskClarification + Tentative.
Known topic with reasoning chain attached → RunReasoner + Derived.
Clean reasoning chain (no belief conflict) — verifier supports, output cites chain.
Belief conflict + reasoning chain → verifier rejects, evidence stripped, output is conflict-surfacing.
Unknown topic, no evidence — verifier doesn't gate (clean path), reply is gentle clarification or noun-echo.
Social greeting → Certain.
Reasoning chain present → Derived.
Real Kazakh noun («бала») without any attached reasoning/retrieval → Tentative band.
Belief contradiction + topic with chain → Conflicted (dominates Derived).

v4.0.40: input that doesn't reduce to a topic, evidence, or chain (e.g. nonsense word) routes to AskClarification (epistemic Tentative, 'rephrase please?') instead of RefuseOutOfScope (epistemic Unknown). Distinct from the 'real topic, no evidence' branch (also Tentative, but says 'I don't have facts about X'). Was aspirational pre-v4.0.40 (cognitive_eval flagged it as gap in v4.0.35).

v4.0.41: when belief has a pending contradiction and the user's next turn names one of the candidate object values (via Statement* intent OR raw-input substring match like 'астанада дұрыс'), the dialog resolves the conflict — chosen → Active, others → Superseded, BeliefConflict + ContradictionToResolve pending question dropped. Skips absorb_entities for the resolution turn so the chosen value isn't double-recorded as a fresh Active fact. Was aspirational pre-v4.0.41.
